description: A guest requests a late check-out.

nodes.task_description: Identify the guest and check their loyalty program status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the guest is a top-tier loyalty member.

nodes.task_description: Check hotel occupancy and housekeeping schedules to see if a late check-out is possible for their room.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that a 2 PM check-out can be accommodated.

nodes.task_description: Grant the complimentary late check-out based on their loyalty status and update the reservation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent approves the request and updates the expected departure time in the PMS.
